question: Will South Carolina H.3492 (partially refundable EITC) be signed into law in 2026?
reason: H.3492 remains in committee with no recent legislative action.
evidence: H.3492 introduced on January 14, 2025, referred to House Ways and Means Committee, no further action reported.
Governor McMaster signed H.4216 into law on April 15, 2026, which includes changes to the state's Earned Income Tax Credit.
No amendments to H.3492 or related legislative activity reported since its introduction.
